subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who hath come with the truth is verily the heaven of bounty unto all nations and the Sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی بالحق انه لسماء الکرم للامم و الایه
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
